scope: Controlled repair loop for config_security_001 on backend live_llm_text.

evidence_grounding.note: Agent artifacts show prompt/report/model-call landing and deterministic verifier reads them.

repair_attribution.note: A1 feedback `missing_capability` triggered repair `patch_capability` and gate `accept`.

transferability.note: Second local controlled security slice only; not broad multi-task live-LLM generalization.

repeatability.note: Not measured for this single loop artifact.

cost_budget.note: Latency and token usage are available in backend metadata/model_calls but not normalized here.

verifier_robustness.note: Verifier distinguished A1 vs A2; before repair missing=['CONFIG_ENV_GUARD'], schema_errors=['none'], weak_evidence=['none'].

human_plausibility.note: No human usefulness review is attached to this loop artifact.

claim_boundary: Single local live-LLM repair-loop evidence on one controlled configuration-security task; verifier and gate remain deterministic.
